prompt: Create a warm, softly lit studio portrait of three adorable plush-like baby animals sitting side by side on a beige floor against a smooth beige background: on the left, a seated baby panda with black-and-white fuzzy fur, round ears, stubby paws, and its face intentionally covered by a flat opaque tan square censor block; in the center, a small baby penguin standing upright with fluffy cream belly, dark brown-black back and head, tiny orange beak and feet, glossy black eyes, and rounded flippers hanging at its sides; on the right, a light beige kitten sitting neatly with big round eyes, small ears, soft short fur, visible whiskers, and curled tail. Use a cute toy-like 3D rendered style with realistic fur fibers, gentle rim light, shallow depth of field, golden backlighting, soft shadows on the ground, cozy nursery-like atmosphere, centered composition, high detail, cinematic warmth, no text.
